1.content: The Lighthouse World is a Glimpse World consisting almost entirely of open ocean under a grey overcast sky. The water is calm regardless of weather. In the entire explored range of this world, there is one feature: a single rock formation barely large enough to stand on, jutting out of the water at no particular location. On this rock stands a lighthouse. The lighthouse is old, constructed of weathered stone, fully intact, and operational — the light at the top rotates on its regular cycle whether anyone is present or not. The door of The Endless that leads to this world is located inside the lighthouse, at the base of the stairs. The lighthouse interior is clean and maintained. There is a logbook on a desk near the door. The logbook has entries in multiple handwriting styles spanning what appears to be a very long period of time. The entries are in multiple languages, some unrecognized. No entry explains who maintains the lighthouse or why the light is always on.

name: The Lighthouse World
description: Glimpse World lorebook for The Lighthouse World — part of The Endless
